root.name: Change presentation title font size to 48pt
root.description: Evaluates whether the presentation title font size was successfully changed to 48pt without introducing extraneous changes

children.name: Title font size changed to 48pt
children.description: Verifies that the presentation title font size has been changed to exactly 48pt

children.name: No extraneous changes made
children.description: Ensures that only the title font size was changed and no other modifications were made to the presentation

children.name: No unintended slide modifications
children.description: Verifies that no slides were added, removed, or had their content modified beyond the title font size change

children.name: No animation or transition changes
children.description: Verifies that no animations or transitions were added, removed, or modified

metadata.task: Change the presentation title font size to 48pt
